metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 💻 Endpoint Compromise & Lateral Movement
---
Traces the full attack chain on endpoints — from initial alert through process execution, network connections, file activity, and lateral movement to other devices. Correlates MDE telemetry across five tables to build a complete picture of what happened after a device was compromised."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🚨 Alert Summary by Device"},"name":"alerts-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AlertInfo
| summarize
    TotalAlerts = count(),
    HighAlerts = countif(Severity == 'High'),
    MedAlerts = countif(Severity == 'Medium'),
    UniqueDevices = dcount(AlertId)
| project TotalAlerts, HighAlerts, MedAlerts, UniqueDevices","size":4,"title":"Alert overview","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalAlerts","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-alerts"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
| summarize AlertCount = count(), HighCount = countif(AlertSeverity == 'High') by DeviceName = CompromisedEntity
| sort by AlertCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Most alerted devices","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"AlertCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}},{"columnMatch":"HighCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"AlertCount","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-alerted-devices"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AlertInfo
| summarize AlertCount = count() by Category
| sort by AlertCount desc","size":3,"title":"Alerts by MITRE category","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-category"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AlertInfo
| where Severity in ('High', 'Medium')
| project TimeGenerated, Title, Severity, Category, ServiceSource, DetectionSource, AttackTechniques
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30","size":0,"title":"Recent high & medium severity alerts","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Severity","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Medium","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-recent-alerts"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## ⚙️ Suspicious Process Execution"},"name":"process-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ (
    'powershell.exe', 'cmd.exe', 'wscript.exe', 'cscript.exe',
    'mshta.exe', 'certutil.exe', 'regsvr32.exe', 'rundll32.exe',
    'msiexec.exe', 'wmic.exe', 'bitsadmin.exe', 'schtasks.exe',
    'at.exe', 'net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'nltest.exe', 'whoami.exe',
    'mimikatz.exe', 'psexec.exe', 'psexec64.exe'
)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100","size":0,"title":"LOLBin & suspicious process executions","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TimeGenerated","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-lolbins"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceProcessEvents
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('powershell.exe', 'cmd.exe', 'wscript.exe', 'cscript.exe', 'mshta.exe')
| where FileName !in~ ('conhost.exe', 'cmd.exe', 'powershell.exe')
| summarize ChildProcessCount = count() by InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, DeviceName
| sort by ChildProcessCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Suspicious child process spawning","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ChildProcessCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-child-processes"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceProcessEvents
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('download', 'webclient', 'invoke-expression', 'iex', 'http://', 'https://', '-enc', '-encodedcommand', 'bypass', 'hidden', '-nop', '-noprofile')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Encoded & download commands","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-encoded-commands"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🌐 Network Connections — C2 & Exfil Indicators"},"name":"network-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| summarize ConnectionCount = count(), DeviceCount = dcount(DeviceId) by RemoteIP, RemotePort, InitiatingProcessFileName
| where ConnectionCount > 5
| sort by ConnectionCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"High-frequency outbound connections to public IPs","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ConnectionCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"ConnectionCount","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-outbound-connections"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemotePort in (4444, 4445, 1337, 8080, 8443, 9001, 9002, 31337)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Connections to common C2 ports","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-c2-ports"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemotePort == 445
| summarize SMBTargetCount = dcount(RemoteIP) by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| where SMBTargetCount > 3
| sort by SMBTargetCount desc","size":0,"title":"SMB scanning — devices touching many internal targets on port 445","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"SMBTargetCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-smb-scan"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where isnotempty(RemoteUrl)
| where RemoteUrl has_any ('.onion', 'pastebin.com', 'paste.ee', 'ngrok.io', 'serveo.net', 'portmap.io')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Connections to suspicious domains","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-suspicious-domains"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📁 Credential & Sensitive File Access"},"name":"file-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceFileEvents
| where FolderPath has_any (
    'lsass', 'SAM', 'SYSTEM', 'SECURITY',
    'ntds.dit', 'credentials', 'keepass',
    'unattend.xml', 'sysprep', 'Groups.xml'
)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, ActionType, FileName, FolderPath, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessAccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Access to credential stores & sensitive files","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-cred-files"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceFileEvents
| where isnotempty(FileOriginUrl)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FileOriginUrl, FolderPath, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessAccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Files downloaded from the internet","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-downloaded-files"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔗 Lateral Movement — Cross-Device Logons"},"name":"lateral-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType in ('Network', 'RemoteInteractive')
| where isnotempty(AccountName)
| summarize
    HopCount = dcount(DeviceName),
    TargetDevices = make_set(DeviceName, 10)
    by AccountName, AccountDomain
| where HopCount > 1
| sort by HopCount desc","size":0,"title":"Accounts logging into multiple devices — lateral movement candidates","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"HopCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"HopCount","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-lateral-accounts"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType == 'RemoteInteractive'
| project TimeGenerated, AccountName, AccountDomain, DeviceName, RemoteDeviceName, RemoteIP, IsLocalAdmin
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"RDP logons — remote interactive sessions","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"IsLocalAdmin","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"true","representation":"critical","text":"Admin"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"User"}]}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-rdp-sessions"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let AlertDevices = SecurityAlert
| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
| summarize by DeviceName = CompromisedEntity;
DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType in ('Network', 'RemoteInteractive')
| join kind=inner AlertDevices on DeviceName
| summarize LogonCount = count() by AccountName, AccountDomain, DeviceName
| sort by LogonCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Logons on alerted devices — who accessed compromised machines","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"LogonCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-alerted-device-logons"}],"styleSettings":{},"fromTemplateId":"","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
